creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
> FTBFS after f7accb23b (ffmpeg update)
What is "f7accb23b"? ffmpeg update is https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=685e477b807c7662670de46b042141939af7555e

Can you test this patch: https://github.com/FreeRDP/FreeRDP/commit/7f55c97d60453738323e0ecafe6d357019528227 ?
